description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On February 25 (Wednesday), Hanno City and Nippon Life Insurance Mutual Company's Kawagoe Branch signed a comprehensive partnership agreement.

Nippon Life Insurance has already established partnership agreements with all 47 prefectures and many municipalities across the country, advancing various collaborative initiatives tailored to the challenges of each region and community.

Hanno City has signed this comprehensive partnership agreement to leverage their knowledge and experience and work together with mutual cooperation on community development.

Both parties will make effective use of the human and material resources they possess and implement joint activities aimed at improving residents' welfare and revitalizing the local community.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202602/13199.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Signing ceremony for comprehensive partnership agreement with Nippon Life Insurance Kawagoe Branch
